_comment: TODO: Replace this with real sample tickets. Aim for 30-50 entries per triageFlow_plan.md Phase 1. Deliberately include a MIX of: obviously low-urgency tickets, obviously critical tickets (including safety-trigger keywords like 'gas leak' or 'fire'), and genuinely AMBIGUOUS tickets where reasonable humans might disagree on urgency. The ambiguous ones are the most valuable for testing — see tests/test_agents/test_classifier_agent.py.
